Scores each logged setup outcome (stop-first = loss, T1-first = win). Splits win-rate and expectancy by verdict tier. Buckets under N=30 are withheld — no verdict on edge until the sample earns it.

Lower → more alerts. Recommended: 65 (Tier B+). For high precision use 75+.
Sets minimum timeframe agreement required before any alert fires.
Coins with R:R below this are silently skipped.
Min time before the same coin can alert again. Default: 900s (15 min).

📲 Telegram Setup
How to get your credentials
1. Open Telegram → search @BotFather
2. Send /newbot → follow steps → copy the Token
3. Search @userinfobot → send any message → copy your Chat ID
4. ⚠️ MUST DO FIRST: Search your bot by its username in Telegram → tap it → send /start (bots can't message you until you do this)
Bot Token (from @BotFather)
Chat ID (from @userinfobot)
Or use a Cloudflare Worker URL instead (advanced):
Worker URL (optional)
